task_objective: Fix autosync status strip visibility while playing configured games by mounting it as a Decky global component.
tests_added: Updated frontend static tests to require Decky global component registration, dismount cleanup, and module-level status state for pre-mount lifecycle events.
design_decisions: Moved the status strip out of the plugin panel content tree and into Decky's global component registry.
Kept createPortal(document.body) for viewport anchoring and z-index behavior.
Stored the latest status at module scope so lifecycle publications are not lost if they occur before the React effect subscribes.
results: Implemented global mounting for the autosync strip and prepared validation for commit.
